meaning: vi.[象声]干呕,作呕,极为讨厌
examples: The findings come from 11 years of observations at the W. M. Keck Observatory in Hawaii.
But a team of researchers at Hawaii's Keck observatory cast their eyes on stars similar to our sun.
Until the 10-meter Keck 1 was built in 1993, the Hale telescope had the best resolving power in the world.
Overall, the potential benefits of the mission are huge, the Keck team says.
They are the first planets discovered by the enormous Keck telescope in Hawaii, the sharpest optical telescope in the world.
